_comment: Monster database — factual knowledge for combat prompts. Keyed by monster_id from CommunicationMod.

JawWorm.tip: Opens with Chomp, then mixes Bellow (+3 Str, gains Block) and Thrash.

Cultist.tip: Uses Incantation turn 1 (+3 Ritual Strength/turn), then attacks every turn.

FuzzyLouseNormal.tip: 75% Bite, 25% Grow (+3 Str). Curl Up: gains Block when first hit by an attack.

FuzzyLouseDefensive.tip: 75% Bite, 25% Spit Web (Weak). Curl Up: gains Block when first hit.

SlaverRed.tip: Uses Entangle (prevents Attacks for 1 turn) and applies Vulnerable.

AcidSlime_L.tip: Corrosive Spit (adds Slimed to discard), Tackle, Lick (Weak). Splits into 2 medium slimes at 50% HP.

AcidSlime_M.tip: Corrosive Spit and Lick. Cannot split.

SpikeSlime_L.tip: Flame Tackle and Lick (Frail). Splits into 2 medium slimes at 50% HP.

SpikeSlime_M.tip: Flame Tackle and Lick (Frail). Cannot split.

FungiBeast.tip: 60% Bite, 40% Grow (+Str). On death: Spore Cloud applies 2 Vulnerable.

Looter.tip: Steals gold with attacks, then Smoke Bombs and escapes after several turns.

Mugger.tip: Act 2 version of Looter — steals gold and escapes.

GremlinNob.tip: Gains 2 Strength every time you play a Skill. Skull Bash applies Vulnerable.

Lagavulin.tip: Sleeps 3 turns with 8 Metallicize. Wakes on HP damage through Block. Pattern: Attack, Attack, Siphon Soul (-1 Str/-1 Dex), repeat.

Sentry.tip: 3 Sentries alternate Bolt (adds 2 Daze to discard) and Beam (attack). Sentries 0/2 start Bolt, Sentry 1 starts Beam.

GremlinWarrior.tip: Melee Gremlin — attacks for moderate damage. Low HP.

GremlinThief.tip: Steals gold on attack. Low HP.

GremlinFat.tip: Applies Weak with attacks. Low HP.

GremlinWizard.tip: Charges up, then hits for massive damage.

GremlinTsundere.tip: Shielding Gremlin — gives Block to other Gremlins. Low HP.

Centurion.tip: Attacks and applies Fury (+Str). Paired with Healer.

TheGuardian.tip: Mode Shift counter decreases by damage dealt; at 0, enters Defensive Mode with Sharp Hide (deals damage per Attack card played). Roll Attack then Twin Slam in Defensive Mode.

Hexaghost.tip: Turn 1: Activate (nothing). Turn 2: Divider (6 hits × your unblocked HP from turn 1). Then cycles Sear/Tackle/Inflame(+2 Str)/Inferno(6-hit).

SlimeBoss.tip: Pattern: Goop Spray (3 Slimed), Preparing, Slam (35 damage). Splits into 2 large slimes at 50% HP.

Chosen.tip: Turn 1: Poke. Turn 2: Hex (adds Dazed to draw pile when you play non-Attacks).

Byrd.tip: Flight: takes 50% damage until hit 3+ times in one turn. Multi-hit attacks ground them.

Shelled Parasite.tip: 14 Plated Armor (gains Block/turn). If Plated Armor hits 0, stunned for a turn.

SphericGuardian.tip: Only 20 HP but has Barricade (Block persists) and 3 Artifact.

SnakePlant.tip: 65% Chomp, 35% Enfeebling Spores (Weak + Frail). Malleable: gains increasing Block per hit/turn.

Snecko.tip: Opens with Perplexing Glare (Confused: randomizes card costs 0-3). Then Bite/Tail Whip (Vulnerable). Artifact blocks Confused.

BookOfStabbing.tip: Multi-Stab increases hit count each use. Shuffles Wound into deck on unblocked damage.

GremlinLeader.tip: Summons Gremlins and Encourages (+Str to all). All minions die when Leader dies.

Champ.tip: Phase 1: Attacks + Taunt (Weak/Vuln) every 4 turns. At 50% HP: Anger (+6 Str, removes debuffs) then Execute.

BronzeAutomaton.tip: Spawns Orbs (steal cards via Stasis). Pattern: Flail/Boost/Flail/Boost/Hyper Beam/Stunned. Stunned turn = free damage. Kill Orbs to recover stolen cards.

TheCollector.tip: Spawns 2 Torch Heads. Mega Debuff on turn 4 (Vuln+Weak+Frail). May re-summon killed Torch Heads.

TorchHead.tip: Summoned by The Collector. Attacks for moderate damage.

Darkling.tip: Life Link — dead Darklings revive with 50% HP unless ALL are at 0 HP simultaneously.

OrbWalker.tip: Laser adds Burn to draw and discard piles.

SpireGrowth.tip: Constrict deals unavoidable damage at end of your turn, stacking each use.

Transient.tip: 999 HP but dies after ~5 turns (Fading). Attacks escalate +10 Str/turn.

Nemesis.tip: Alternates Intangible (all damage reduced to 1) and vulnerable turns. Shuffles Burns.

Reptomancer.tip: Summons Daggers that Explode for massive damage on their 2nd turn.

SnakeDagger.tip: Summoned by Reptomancer. Explodes for massive damage on its 2nd turn.

WrithingMass.tip: Reactive: changes intent when hit. Malleable: gains Block per hit/turn. Can use Implant (adds Parasite curse).

GiantHead.tip: Slow debuff: Attacks deal 10% less for each card played this turn. Has countdown to massive hit.

TheMaw.tip: Opens with Roar (Weak + Frail). Drool gains Strength, then alternates Slam/Nom.

AwakenedOne.tip: Phase 1 — Curiosity: gains Strength each time you play a Power. At 0 HP, revives full HP in Phase 2 (Curiosity removed).

TimeEater.tip: After every 12 cards played, ends your turn and gains 2 Str. At 50% HP: Haste heals to 50% and removes debuffs (once).

Donu.tip: Alternates Circle of Power (+3 Str to ALL enemies) and Beam. Starts with 2 Artifact.

Deca.tip: Alternates Beam and Square of Protection (Block). Adds Daze to deck. Starts with 2 Artifact.
